title: Vant-Lynx Animation Polish
description: Add main-thread event-driven animations to popup-style components using Lynx's native Web Animations API (element.animate).

context.mainThreadEvent: Use :main-thread-bindXxx to bind worklet functions that run on the main thread. These can access element.animate() directly for smooth 60fps animations.
context.animateApi: element.animate(keyframes, options) - Web Animations API style. keyframes is array of {property: value}, options has duration, easing, fill, etc.
context.pattern: 1) Use useMainThreadRef to get element ref. 2) Create worklet function with 'main-thread' directive. 3) Call ref.current.animate() in worklet. 4) Trigger animation on show state change.
context.transitionComponent: vue-lynx also has <Transition> component for CSS class-based animations, but main-thread animate() is more powerful for complex animations.
context.example: const elRef = useMainThreadRef<Element>(); function onShow() { 'main-thread'; elRef.current?.animate([{opacity: 0}, {opacity: 1}], {duration: 300}); }
context.testing: IMPORTANT: element.animate() for web-core just landed in PR #2329. Web may not work yet. Test with: 1) Lynx Simulator (Android/iOS emulator), or 2) Link local ~/github/lynx-stack. Build verification (pnpm build) is sufficient for CI - animation behavior should be tested manually on simulator.
context.fallback: If animate() is not available at runtime, animations should gracefully degrade to instant show/hide. Check if elRef.current?.animate is a function before calling.

userStories.title: Create useAnimate composable
userStories.description: Create a composable that wraps main-thread animate() calls with common animation presets for enter/leave transitions.
requirements: Export useAnimate() that returns { elRef, animate, fadeIn, fadeOut, slideIn, slideOut, zoomIn, zoomOut }
elRef is useMainThreadRef<Element>() - bind to element with :main-thread-ref
animate(keyframes, options) is a main-thread worklet wrapper
All functions are 'main-thread' worklets that call elRef.current.animate()
Return Animation object for cancel/pause control
userStories.testCommand: pnpm build && echo 'NOTE: Test animations on Lynx Simulator, Web may not support animate() yet'

userStories.title: Overlay fade animation
userStories.description: Add fade in/out animation to Overlay component when show changes.
requirements: Bind elRef to overlay view with :main-thread-ref
Watch show prop - call fadeIn() on true, fadeOut() on false
Use onAfterLeave pattern: keep in DOM during fadeOut, remove after animation ends
Respect duration prop for animation timing
Start with opacity: 0 style, animate to 1

userStories.title: Popup position-based transitions
userStories.description: Add slide/fade transitions to Popup based on position prop using main-thread animate().
requirements: Bind elRef to popup container with :main-thread-ref
Respect duration prop, convert to ms
Use animation.finished promise to emit 'opened'/'closed' events
Keep popup in DOM during leave animation

userStories.title: Dialog zoom animation
userStories.description: Add zoom/fade animation to Dialog component.
requirements: Dialog uses Popup internally - ensure Popup animations work
If Dialog has custom content wrapper, add zoom animation

userStories.title: ActionSheet slide-up animation
requirements: Verify slideUp animation from Popup works
If ActionSheet has wrapper, ensure it inherits animation

userStories.title: Toast fade animation
userStories.description: Add fade in/out animation to Toast.
requirements: Toast appears with fade + slight scale
Position-aware: center toast zooms, top/bottom toasts slide

userStories.title: Notify slide-down animation
userStories.description: Add slide-down animation to Notify (top notification bar).
requirements: Smooth easing (ease-out for enter, ease-in for leave)

userStories.title: DropdownItem slide animation
userStories.description: Add slide animation to dropdown menu items.
requirements: Dropdown content slides down when opened

userStories.title: ImagePreview zoom animation
userStories.description: Add zoom animation to image preview overlay.
requirements: Image zooms from thumbnail position (if available) or center

userStories.title: ShareSheet slide-up animation
requirements: ShareSheet uses Popup or ActionSheet pattern

userStories.title: FloatingPanel slide animation
userStories.description: Add slide animation to FloatingPanel anchors.
requirements: Panel slides between anchor positions smoothly
Use spring-like easing for natural feel

userStories.title: FloatingBubble appear animation
userStories.description: Add bounce/scale animation when FloatingBubble appears.
requirements: Bubble scales up with slight overshoot (bounce)

userStories.title: SwipeCell spring animation
userStories.description: Add spring animation when SwipeCell snaps back.
requirements: When released, cell snaps to open/closed position with spring

userStories.title: NoticeBar scroll animation
userStories.description: Ensure NoticeBar text scrolls smoothly when content overflows.
